label: decadent (person)
pattern: InstanceSchema; morally bad action as an attenuated rendering of decline
gloss: A person whose conduct or artistic work manifests decline from an earlier standard of moral seriousness, discipline, or cultural vitality, often through self-indulgence, artificiality, or corruption.
notes: AST adequacy: lossy — it renders moral failure as doing something bad but cannot represent decline from an earlier standard or the artistic differentia.
